rawAssistant: A hasty departure, eh? For a journey to the marsh, you'll want something that can help counteract the poison's effects. I'd recommend my Salvage Kit charm - it might just save Emberfox's hide. And perhaps a spare Antidote vial, if you have one handy? I've got some twine and bandages too, which could come in handy for wrapping up any wounds before the journey gets underway.
